race.comment: This has taken a beating from scratchings with the heavy 10 track. RAIKOKE (5) was just edged out on genuinely heavy ground at Terang latest by Salsa Fellow who goes around two races earlier. 1400m is fine, he'll be up on speed and should give a sight. TEST OF LOVE (7) can bounce back off a poor run at Oakbank - plenty don't handle that track and he was racing well prior. He's never seen a heavy but has handled soft ground in the past.  PLACO (8) is off a short spell into this having won dominantly in Adelaide when last seen. He won his only start on heavy and has been given two solid trials. The wide draw is probably a bonus at this point. DUBAI DANCER (9) resumes. She's another with a strong heavy track record who can figure for the airborne Dabernig yard.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $75,000
